title: refactor architecture
body: Migrate ARCHITECTURE.json from legacy c4 schema ({$schema:c4, role, title, children[]} with dotted ids and no name/detail/columns) to the canonical columns/tree schema (schemaVersion 2.0, kind architecture-tree). All 32 source nodes preserved losslessly; dotted ids kebab-cased (dilemma.x -> dilemma-x, light-source.rankN -> light-source-rankN); 8 over-300-char roles decomposed into role+detail; added canonical 4-column header + viewer/serve fields + synthesized root node. Copied canonical ARCHITECTURE.html viewer (SRC=ARCHITECTURE.json). architecture lint: ok.
